metadata.description: The astrojones org plugin index. This repo is only the marketplace; each plugin lives in its own repo.

plugins.name: astrojones-dev
plugins.description: The astrojones org plugin: nuklaut deploy knowledge, /new-app scaffolding (born harnessed), deploy-doctor CI diagnosis, plus the repo-agent-harness Claude Code surface (workflow skills, subagents, safety-hook shims, /harness-init). The harness MCP server itself is always per-repo (sha-pinned .mcp.json) — no plugin ships a server.
